projects.question: Tell me about a cloud project you've worked on.
Which cloud platform did you use in your most significant project and why?
What problem was your cloud project trying to solve?
What was your role in the project?
Which cloud services did you use most frequently?
What was the biggest technical challenge in your project?
How did you deploy your application?
How did you monitor your cloud infrastructure?
How did you secure your cloud environment?
What would you improve if you rebuilt the project today?
Walk me through the architecture of your cloud project.
How did you make your cloud infrastructure scalable?
Describe your disaster recovery strategy.
How did you optimize cloud costs in your project?
Describe your Infrastructure as Code workflow.
How did you secure secrets and credentials?
Describe the CI/CD pipeline used in your cloud project.
How did you troubleshoot production incidents?
How did your team collaborate on cloud infrastructure changes?
How did you validate changes before deploying them to production?
Imagine your production cloud infrastructure fails during peak business hours. Walk me through your response from detection to recovery.
Your CEO asks you to reduce cloud costs by 40% without reducing reliability. Explain your approach.
Your application suddenly scales from ten thousand to ten million users. Explain how your architecture would evolve.
A security audit discovers several critical vulnerabilities in your cloud infrastructure. Explain your remediation process.
Design your ideal cloud project from scratch for a global SaaS company and explain every architectural decision.
